reference: RELIGION RESTS ON THE IDEA THAT NATURE HAS A MASTER AND THAT THIS MASTER WILL LISTEN TO PRAYER THAT THIS MASTER PUNISHES AND REWARDS THAT HE LOVES PRAISE AND FLATTERY AND HATES THE BRAVE AND FREE
text: Religion rests on the idea that nature has a master, and that this master will listen to prayer, that this master punishes and rewards, that he loves praise and flattery, and hates the brave and free.
